mainEntity.name: What if my respiratory claim is denied by the workers' comp insurer in Taylorsville?
mainEntity.text: What if my respiratory claim is denied by the workers' comp insurer in Taylorsville?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal within 20 days via Utah Labor Commission Form 25; request medical panel if causation disputed, then evidentiary hearing before ALJ within 6 months.

suggestedAnswer.text: Taylorsville denials common for 'pre-existing' conditions. Gather IME, co-worker affidavits, exposure data. Commission reverses 30% on appeal. Attorney fees from insurer if successful. Delays average 12-18 months; continue treatment via fee disputes.

name: Appealing Denied Respiratory Workers' Comp Claims in Taylorsville
description: Appeal within 20 days via Utah Labor Commission Form 25; request medical panel if causation disputed, then evidentiary hearing before ALJ within 6 months.
